title: Pneumonanthe punctata
taxonomy: Pneumonanthe punctata is a species of flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae. It is native to Europe. The classification of Pneumonanthe punctata is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, clade - Angiosperms, clade - Eudicots, clade - Asterids, order - Gentianales, family - Gentianaceae, genus - Pneumonanthe, species - P. punctata. Within its family, Pneumonanthe punctata is part of the tribe Gentianeae. The genus Pneumonanthe is considered monotypic, consisting of only this single species.
